commits.message: fix(site): explicit rich-js dep in prebuild to resolve file: path

perf(site): pre-install node_modules as WebContainer snapshot

Eliminates the `npm install` step at runtime. Users fetch a prebuilt
binary snapshot and WebContainer mounts it instantly.

Also:
- Drop tsx — pre-compile demos to plain JS at site build time using
  host esbuild. WebContainer runs `node demo.js` directly.
- Use esbuild-wasm in the browser for live edit recompilation
  (lazy-loaded on first edit)
- Strip maps/tests/docs from snapshot before serializing

Snapshot size: 6.0 MB (down from 27.4 MB with tsx included)
Boot time: fetch snapshot in parallel with WebContainer.boot(),
then instant mount — no npm install waiting
